# services.deconz

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.deconz`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.deconz.allowRebootSystem` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rebooting the system. |
| `services.deconz.allowRestartService` | `boolean` | Whether to enable killing/restarting processes. |
| `services.deconz.allowSetSystemTime` | `boolean` | Whether to enable setting the system time. |
| `services.deconz.device` | `null or string` | Force deCONZ to use a specific USB device (e.g. /dev/ttyACM0). By default it does a search. |
| `services.deconz.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable deCONZ, a Zigbee gateway for use with ConBee/RaspBee hardware (https://phoscon.de/). |
| `services.deconz.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments for deCONZ, see <https://github.com/dresden-elektronik/deconz-rest-plugin/wiki/deCONZ-command-line-parameters>. |
| `services.deconz.httpPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port for the web server. |
| `services.deconz.listenAddress` | `string` | Pin deCONZ to the network interface specified through the provided IP address. This applies for the webserver as well as the websocket notifications. |
| `services.deconz.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening up the service ports in the firewall. |
| `services.deconz.package` | `package` | The deconz package to use. |
| `services.deconz.wsPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port for the WebSocket. |
